---
title: "Poster"
author: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
toc: false
---

> *(placeholder)* The conference poster summarising the project will appear here.

## Poster

_Once the poster is ready, save it to `images/` and embed it below. For a PDF you can
also link to it for download._

<!-- Image version -->
<!-- ![Team HeeHaa project poster](images/poster.png) -->

<!-- PDF embed -->
<!-- <embed src="images/poster.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="800px" /> -->

[Download the poster (PDF)](#){.btn .btn-primary} <!-- TODO: point to images/poster.pdf -->
